data.title: UXLINK completes new contract deployment and announces token migration and compensation plan
data.description: UXLINK released an update stating that it has completed the deployment of a new smart contract (address: 0x3991…Feb 3) and submitted the incident report and migration plan to DAXA and several major exchanges. Legally circulating tokens will be exchanged at a 1:1 ratio, with a total supply of 479,713,462 tokens. Illegally issued and stolen tokens will not be exchanged, and some have been suspended from circulation. The official on-chain exchange portal will be launched within five business days. The team will also launch a compensation plan based on recovered assets and is working with regulators in Singapore, South Korea, and Japan to freeze wallets related to the hack.

data.title: China’s year-end bond supply set to shrink
data.description:
China’s bond issuance is set to shrink sharply by year-end, leaving only 16% of the annual quota.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/chinas-year-end-bond-supply-set-to-shrink/

data.title: GriffinAI Transfers Ethereum to Tornado Cash
data.description: According to Foresight News, SlowMist's Chief Information Security Officer, 23pds, has reported that GriffinAI's issuance address has begun transferring Ethereum to Tornado Cash.

data.title: Most crypto stocks fell at the close of the US stock market, with HODL down 12.59%.
data.description: According to MyStonks data, at the close of US stocks, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.37% to 46,121 points; the S&P 500 fell 0.28% to 6,637 points; and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.33% to 22,497 points. BitMine fell approximately 4.72% to $51.92; HODL fell approximately 12.59% to 6.94 Canadian dollars; BTCS rose approximately 6.83% to $4.85; and ALTS fell approximately 9.28% to $3.42. MyStonks is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: After losing $35.84 million on ETH long positions, traders went long again, opening at $4,178 and only $100 away from the liquidation price.
data.description: According to monitoring by crypto analyst Ember @EmberCN, a trader who had previously lost $35.84 million on ETH long positions and another $7.5 million on BTC short positions opened another long position of 15,700 ETH (worth approximately $65.4 million) 5 hours ago. The opening price was $4,178 and the liquidation price was $4,078, a difference of only $100.

data.title: GSR submits application to the US SEC to launch digital asset treasury company ETF and multiple crypto funds
data.description: Crypto market maker GSR has filed an application with the US SEC to launch a digital asset treasury company ETF, with at least 80% of its assets allocated to publicly traded companies holding cryptocurrencies. Initially, the ETF plans to include 10 to 15 stocks, including Strategy, Bitmine, SharpLink, and SUI Group. GSR has also applied for four funds focused on Ethereum staking, crypto staking, the core three assets (BTC, ETH, and SOL), and Ethereum returns. The SEC previously relaxed listing standards for commodity trusts, making the approval environment for crypto ETFs more relaxed. (Decrypt)

data.title: Hyperliquid’s USDH stablecoin will launch today, with early trading volume reaching nearly $2 million.
data.description: Hyperliquid's stablecoin USDH has officially launched today, with early trading volume approaching $2 million. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Solana-Based Melee Secures $3.5 Million in Funding
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Solana ecosystem's prediction market platform, Melee, has announced the successful completion of a $3.5 million funding round. The investment was led by DBA and Variant, along with several strategic angel investors.

Melee allows users to create markets on any topic, enabling creators to monetize their audience while traders have the opportunity to earn profits.

data.title: Whales bought HYPE again after 9 months, now holding $12.99 million worth of HYPE
data.description: According to OnchainLens, a whale deposited $6 million in USDC into Hyperliquid nine months ago to purchase HYPE. The address currently holds 285,500 HYPE (valued at approximately $12.99 million), with a paper profit of approximately $7.16 million and approximately $2.06 million in USDC remaining for additional holdings.

data.title: South Korea’s ruling democratic party launches crypto task force
data.description:
South Korea’s ruling Democratic Party (DP) has launched a new crypto task force to draft policies for the sector.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/korea-party-launches-crypto-task-force/

data.title: Arthur Hayes Family Office Awards Bitcoin Development Grant to Spherostrat
data.description: According to PANews, Maelstrom, the family office of Arthur Hayes, has announced a one-year Bitcoin development grant to Spherostrat. The grant will enable Spherostrat to focus on enhancing privacy in peer-to-peer networks, optimizing block validation, and developing DLEQ proofs for Silent Payment addresses.

data.title: Whales withdraw another 26 million ASTER, with current holdings reaching approximately $116 million.
data.description: According to OnchainLens, the whale address 0xfb3b…2833 recently withdrew 26 million ASTER (worth approximately $59 million) from Gate. The address currently holds a total of 50 million ASTER (worth approximately $115.5 million), with a paper profit of approximately $9.92 million.

data.title: GriffinAI (GAIN) plummets 90% to $0.006
data.description: According to market data, the price of GriffinAI (GAIN) has plummeted by 90% to $0.006, which may be related to its issuance of 5 billion additional tokens.

data.title: Whale's Recent Ethereum Long Position Faces Narrow Margin
data.description: According to Foresight News, a major cryptocurrency trader, previously incurring a $35.84 million loss on a long Ethereum (ETH) position and a $7.5 million loss on a short Bitcoin (BTC) position, has recently opened a new long position on Ethereum. The trader acquired 15,700 ETH, valued at approximately $65.4 million, with an entry price of $4,178 and a liquidation price of $4,078, leaving a narrow margin of $100.
